description_long: This is a tall, conical Christmas tree with dense, layered branches that are heavily coated in artificial snow, giving it a frosted, wintry appearance. The branches are thick and bushy, with the snow accentuating the tips and creating a soft, powdery texture throughout the tree. The tree lacks any visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or a topper, maintaining a natural, snow-covered look. The trunk is not visible, as the branches extend all the way to the base, forming a full silhouette. The coloration is predominantly a mix of dark green and white, with the snow cover being the most visually dominant feature. This tree would be suitable for placement in urban parks, plazas, or festive street corners as a seasonal decoration.
description: A tall, conical Christmas tree densely covered in artificial snow, with thick, bushy branches and no visible decorations or topper. The tree has a natural, frosted appearance and a full silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tree's dense, snow-covered branches and symmetrical conical shape, with the snow most prominent on the outer tips.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the tree's layered branches and the heavy snow coverage, with a slight asymmetry in the lower left branches.
description_view_2: The tree appears slightly narrower from this angle, with the snow coverage still dominant and the branch density consistent throughout.
description_view_3: This view shows a more rounded profile, with the snow evenly distributed and the branches forming a full, bushy silhouette.
